tasks.title: Fix Composio app connections
tasks.description: getConnectionStatus returns empty connected/missing arrays even for valid users. Investigate Composio API response and add better error messages.

tasks.title: Add test isolation (reset test DB between runs)
tasks.description: Tests currently use hardcoded phone numbers. Add unique phone numbers per run and clean up test users after each test.

tasks.title: Connect production deployment target
tasks.description: Set up Railway/Render/Fly.io deployment and wire it into the deploy-prod.yml GitHub Action.

tasks.title: Set up monitoring/alerting
tasks.description: Add health check monitoring, error alerting, and uptime tracking for the production server.

tasks.title: Implement workflow retry logic
tasks.description: BullMQ workflow jobs currently fail silently on transient errors. Add configurable retry with exponential backoff.

tasks.title: Add rate limiting to workflow runs
tasks.description: Prevent abuse by rate-limiting workflow executions per user. Use existing Redis infrastructure.
